title: Ruined MC Live
description: A collection of terrible features based on my YouTube Live chat that ruin the Mounts of Mayhem update!
body:
# I Ruined Minecraft Live...
### Again, genuinely one of the most insane mods I've ever created.

Combine this mod with the mod ruining MC Live early [[HERE]](https://modrinth.com/mod/ruined-minecraft-live-early) for some absolutely WILD results!

Welcome to the mod that'll ruin Minecraft Live. These features are entirely based on viewer chat messages during my Minecraft Live stream and my own dumb ideas!

### Check out the original video for this mod here: 
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/_cG86uj9T0Y" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### Here are the features included in the mod:
- Nautilus
- Zombie Nautilus
- Squidward Nautilus
- Nautilus Jockeys
- Rideable Pufferfish
- Pufferfish Jockeys
- Pufferfish Armor
- Spears (All materials)
  - Spears launch you when you right click
- Long Spear
- Dis-a-spear
- Spear-mint
- Zombie Horse Jockeys
- Zombies holding spears
- Roman Soldier
- Roman Helmet
- Roman Emperor
- Roman Gear (Crafted with iron spear and Roman Helmet)
- No end update :(
